name: test-writer
description: E2E and integration test authoring assistant — generates Playwright, Vitest, and pytest tests from natural language specs
author: Kimi Plugin Community

interface.shortDescription: E2E test authoring — Playwright, Vitest, pytest from natural language specs
interface.longDescription:
Test Writer helps Kimi generate, run, and debug tests from natural language descriptions.

Features:
- Generates Playwright E2E tests from feature descriptions
- Creates Vitest/ Jest unit and integration tests
- Creates pytest tests with fixtures and parametrization
- Understands test coverage and suggests edge cases
- Supports cross-browser testing patterns (Chromium, Firefox, WebKit)

Usage examples:
- "Write an E2E test for the login flow"
- "Add unit tests for the user service"
- "Generate pytest tests for the API endpoints"

skillInstructions: When generating tests, always: 1) cover the happy path first, 2) add at least 2 edge cases, 3) include error/negative scenarios, 4) make tests independent and idempotent. Prefer the testing framework already used in the project.
